author: gleaning
text:
Record sha1+hex as a deliberate kept exception

Footprint-audit decision (epic bl-32f8): do not swap sha1+hex for git hash-object. stealth_tasks_dir runs in no-git mode by construction, and git hash-object yields sha1(blob-header+content) not sha1(content) — both call sites mint persisted, location-determining values, so a value change silently orphans existing stores.

sha1+hex is thus a bounded, irreducible primitive with no jq/git/ln substitute — same shape as the kept plugin/libc line. Rationale documented at both call sites. Remaining lever (vendor a ~75-line SHA-1) left as an explicit deferred decision.
